home.title: EAT. SLEEP. CODE. REPEAT.
home.subtitle: SAMUEL DEMON - FULL STACK DEVELOPER
home.description: As a third-year Computer Science student at the University of Lille (research-intensive track), I am passionate about Full Stack development and technical challenges. With a solid foundation in object-oriented programming (Java) and web development (React, Node.js), I combine academic rigor with hands-on personal projects, such as creating a film blog or a game engine. I am currently seeking an internship opportunity starting in April 2026 to apply my skills to innovative projects.
